summary.what_built: This module creates a health check endpoint for a web service.
summary.problem: It solves the problem of monitoring the database connection status to ensure the service is operational.
summary.risk: The risk level is medium due to potential error handling gaps and reliance on a hardcoded database path.
summary.validation: The code was checked for syntax and basic functionality and passed those checks.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the health check endpoint will be added to the application and will start monitoring the database connection.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how the endpoint will handle specific database connection errors, so monitoring after apply is advised.
